series_metadata.series_description: News releases relating to the insurance industry, these records include written and electronic versions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: In office 1 year, on-site 2 years, off-site 2 years, then destroy ; Electronic: In office 1 year, on-site 2 years, off-site 2 years, then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
